title: Allow searching with multiple different queries at the same time
description: Currently runes search will fail if you give it more than one argument. Instead, handle each argument as an individual search term and output separate search results for each. This allows saving agent resources (fewer tool calls), and also improves performance since we can use the in-memory index multiple times

history.note: Implemented multi-query search: modified search command to accept multiple arguments, added SearchRunes function to reuse loaded runes across queries

title: Rename skill from runes-agent to runes

history.note: Renamed skill from runes-agent to runes: updated SKILL.md frontmatter, init.go reference path, and README.md link

title: Fix research agent not completing on its own
description:
When running the rsearch agent through mimir research run, the application will not terminate on its own. It remains until killed with KeyboardInterrupt, providing this output: Exception ignored in: <module 'threading' from '/home/andreas/.local/share/uv/python/cpython-3.11-linux-x86_64-gnu/lib/python3.11/threading.py'>
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File /home/andreas/.local/share/uv/python/cpython-3.11-linux-x86_64-gnu/lib/python3.11/threading.py, line 1590, in _shutdown
    lock.acquire()
KeyboardInterrupt:
